summary: Memorable Orlando Arena show highlighted by a stellar second‑set 'Eyes of the World' and praised piano work; recording quality not discussed.
review: The reviewer fondly recalls this early‑Bruce Hornsby era concert, especially the opening of the second set with an inspired 'Eyes of the World' and Hornsby's bright piano sound. No specific comments on the audio fidelity are provided, so the technical side remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 4‑star review emphasizes strong performance (especially Eyes of the World and piano) with no noted recording flaws; limited data yields moderate confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer does not mention any aspects of sound quality, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Early Bruce Hornsby era; second‑set opener 'Eyes of the World' singled out as a highlight, with overall positive vibe despite being described as not the most memorable show.

band_member_comments.Keys: Bruce Hornsby's piano was noted as sounding very good.
